audit_items.proof_trace: Within closure_helper.h there are no pointer dereference operations at all: get_pointer() returns its argument without dereferencing it, the ConditionalAutoDeleter constructor merely stores the pointer, and the destructor calls delete m_p which is safe on NULL per C++ standard (§7.5 expr.delete). The property assertion has an empty domain — no ptr_deref(p) expressions exist in this file.
